message:
feat(rch): implement check command health verification logic

Complete implementation of the 'rch check' quick health command:

- Add CheckResponse, DaemonCheckInfo, WorkersCheckInfo, HookCheckInfo
  structs for structured JSON output
- Query daemon status via socket
- Calculate worker health (total vs healthy vs unhealthy list)
- Check hook installation status
- Return appropriate exit codes:
  - 0: Ready (daemon running, all workers healthy)
  - 1: Degraded (partial worker availability)
  - 2: Not ready (daemon not running)

Supports both human-readable and --json output modes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
